step.name: set-up-ai-tag
step.action: Define how AI authors are tagged (commit pattern, label, branch prefix).

step.name: wire-routing
step.action: PR pipeline checks AI tag; sets `sonar.qualitygate.name=ai-strict-v1` if true.

step.name: enforce-merge-gate
step.action: Require Sonar status check to pass before merge.

step.name: audit-overrides
step.action: Pull override events; review rate + reasons.
